g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with the Lumière French learning app?')
sendPrompt('How does Sentry monitor errors in the Lumière app?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions trigger the weekly newsletter pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What routes does the Flask App expose in the Lumière architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does generate_lesson.py do in the Lumière app?')
sendPrompt('What does weekly_generate.py do in the Lumière app?')
sendPrompt('What does send_email.py do in the Lumière app?')
sendPrompt('How does the Lumière app use the Claude API?')
sendPrompt('How does Supabase store data in the Lumière app?')
sendPrompt('How does the Lumière app use Gmail API for email delivery?')
sendPrompt('How do subscribers receive their weekly French exercises from Lumière?')

line.style: stroke: var(--color-border-secondary); stroke-width:1; stroke-dasharray:4 3;fill:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke:rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.3);color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-dasharray:4px, 3px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
